name: no-sdr
description: Multi-user WebSDR server for RTL-SDR dongles — real-time waterfall, stereo FM, AM/SSB/CW, digital mode decoding

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=shared && (npm run dev --workspace=shared & npm run dev --workspace=server & npm run dev --workspace=client & wait)
scripts.dev:demo: npm run build --workspace=shared && (NODE_SDR_DEMO=1 npm run dev --workspace=shared & NODE_SDR_DEMO=1 npm run dev --workspace=server & npm run dev --workspace=client & wait)
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.clean: rm -rf shared/dist server/dist client/dist node_modules/.cache shared/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo server/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
